title: Type resolution error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bam_alignments_3 (virtual_offset BIGINT NOT NULL, qname LONGTEXT NOT NULL, flag SMALLINT NOT NULL, rname LONGTEXT NOT NULL, pos INT NOT NULL, epos INT NOT NULL, mapq SMALLINT NOT NULL, cigar LONGTEXT NOT NULL, rnext LONGTEXT NOT NULL, pnext INT NOT NULL, tlen INT NOT NULL, seq LONGTEXT NOT NULL, qual LONGTEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (virtual_offset));
